name: upload_media
description: Upload files to the Strapi media library. Supports images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG), videos, documents (PDF, DOCX), and other file types. Files are uploaded using multipart/form-data. Optionally, you can link the uploaded file directly to a content entry's media field during upload. Uploaded files get auto-generated thumbnails and responsive image formats for images. Returns file metadata including the URL, dimensions, size, and generated formats.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: The file(s) to upload. Send as multipart/form-data with the field name 'files'. Multiple files can be uploaded at once.

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: The content type API name to link the file to (e.g., 'api::article.article'). Used together with 'refId' and 'field' to attach the upload directly to a content entry.

parameters.name: refId
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the content entry to link the file to. Used together with 'ref' and 'field'.

parameters.name: field
parameters.description: The field name on the content entry to attach the file to (e.g., 'cover_image'). Used together with 'ref' and 'refId'.

parameters.name: fileInfo
parameters.description: Optional metadata for the file: { 'name': 'custom-name', 'alternativeText': 'Alt text for accessibility', 'caption': 'Image caption' }.

fileInfo.name: ai-agents-hero
fileInfo.caption: How AI agents discover and use APIs

body.name: ai-agents-hero.jpg
body.caption: How AI agents discover and use APIs
